title: Account statuses timeline: paginated, exclude-replies, exclude-reblogs
description:
Return paginated list of statuses by account at GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/statuses. Params: max_id, since_id, min_id, limit (default 20 max 40), exclude_replies, exclude_reblogs, only_media, pinned. For local accounts query posts table. For remote accounts query remote_posts. Serialize each as Status object.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to test this endpoint against mastodon.social and document the exact pagination Link header format.

Test discipline: insert 5 posts, fetch with limit=3 returns 3 with Link header having next and prev; exclude_replies=true filters out replies; exclude_reblogs=true filters out boost wrapper posts; limit=1 paginate through all posts receives all in correct order; empty timeline returns [] with no Link header. Use real in-memory SQLite not mocks. mastodon.social pagination Link header format is the oracle.

Defensive programming: limit parameter clamped to range 1 to 40 rather than returning 422 (Mastodon behavior); validate max_id and since_id are valid integers and return empty array not error if invalid (Mastodon behavior); no .unwrap() outside tests; all errors Result<T, AppError>.
acceptance_criteria: Paginated correctly with correct Link header format; limit clamped to 40 not rejected; Link header present when more pages exist; exclude_replies and exclude_reblogs work; empty timeline returns [] without Link header
